title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 13 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 13 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 13 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures fell first and then rose today， the main contract closed 817，an increase of 0.93% throughout the day;Traders ship according to market conditions; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable. PBF at Shandong port dealt 805-815 yuan/mt; the same as yesterday.
